ddls:
CREATE TABLE "glasses" (
  "glass_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each glass sample */,
  "composition" TEXT /* Chemical composition of the glass */,
  "t_g" REAL /* Glass transition temperature */,
  "density" REAL /* Density of the glass */,
  "v_m" REAL /* Molar volume of the glass */,
  "e_a" REAL /* Activation energy of the glass */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the glass sample was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the scientist who created the glass sample */,
  "modified_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last modification of the glass sample data */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the scientist who last modified the glass sample data */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number to track changes in the glass sample data */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the glass sample */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("glass_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "glass_id" INTEGER /* ID of the glass sample used in the experiment */,
  "experiment_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was conducted */,
  "scientist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the scientist who conducted the experiment */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument used in the experiment */,
  "result_notes" TEXT /* Notes on the experiment results */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the experiment was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the scientist who created the experiment entry */,
  "modified_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last modification of the experiment data */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the scientist who last modified the experiment data */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the experiment */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the experiment in minutes */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost associated with the experiment */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project to which the experiment belongs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_scientist_id FOREIGN KEY ("scientist_id") REFERENCES scientists ("scientist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_glass_id FOREIGN KEY ("glass_id") REFERENCES glasses ("glass_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scientists" (
  "scientist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scientist */,
  "scientist_name" TEXT /* Full name of the scientist */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the scientist */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the scientist belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the scientist's record was created */,
  "modified_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last modification of the scientist's record */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the scientist */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the scientist's lab */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the scientist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scientist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instrument */,
  "instrument_name" TEXT /* Name of the instrument */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the instrument */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the instrument */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the instrument's record was created */,
  "modified_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last modification of the instrument's record */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of the last calibration */,
  "calibration_due" TEXT /* Date when the next calibration is due */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the instrument */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the instrument */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the instrument */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "glass_compositions" (
  "composition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each composition entry */,
  "glass_id" INTEGER /* ID of the glass sample */,
  "element" TEXT /* Chemical element in the composition */,
  "percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the chemical element in the composition */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the composition entry was created */,
  "modified_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last modification of the composition entry */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "reference" TEXT /* Reference to the source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("composition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_glass_compositions_glass_id FOREIGN KEY ("glass_id") REFERENCES glasses ("glass_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment result */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "measurement_type" TEXT /* Type of measurement taken */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the measurement */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the result was created */,
  "modified_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last modification of the result */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the measurement */,
  "error_margin" REAL /* Error margin of the measurement */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "reference" TEXT /* Reference to the source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_results_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)
